---
title: "Home"
title-block-banner: true
image: images/italy.jpeg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-width: 20em
  image-shape: round
links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: www.linkedin.com/in/ligeaalexander
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/ligeaalexander/
    - icon: envelope
      text: Contact me
      href: mailto:ligea.alex@gmail.com
---

Ligea Alexander is a human-centered designer located in NYC, NY.
